name: arm-stack
title: Stack the blocks
summary: Composes a real LeRobot Diffusion Policy checkpoint. Different architecture, different checkpoint string — identical contract, safety envelope, and transport.
task: Stack the blocks into a tower

policy.runtime: LeRobot (.select_action) · Python bridge or on-device export
policy.note: Proof the composition is architecture-agnostic: ACT and DiffusionPolicy differ entirely inside, but expose the same .select_action(obs) — so the same adapter, contract, and envelope wrap both.
